format.title: Vibrant, educational title for this session

ppt.title: Presentation title
ppt.presentationGoal: What this PPT helps achieve in the session

licensingNotes: Use internally generated images and in-app SVG diagrams only.
assetSearchPlan.fallbackStrategy: Prefer SVG diagrams for concept/process slides and reusable web images for all picture-based visuals.

licenseChecklist: Review generated visuals for classroom accuracy before final export.
Verify reusable license before final export.
presentationWarnings: Do not include untaught future-session content.
Do not include untaught future-session content (e.g., Mole concept details).

visualAttribution.visualPlan: A subject-appropriate teaching visual that clarifies the main idea without adding off-topic content.

svgDiagram.animation: Reveal the visual step by step as the teacher explains it.

slides.visualPlan: What visual should appear and why

assets.searchQuery: precise visual search or generation intent

svgDiagram.title: Diagram title
svgDiagram.type: flowchart | timeline | labelled diagram | comparison chart
instructions: How the diagram should communicate the concept

keyInformation: Student-facing study note or revision point

meta.paperObjective: Assess only the taught session content with the requested paper pattern.

instructions: Answer all questions using only the concepts taught in this session.

awardGuidance: Award full marks only for the correct option.

generalInstructions: Award marks point-wise for each valid idea.
evaluatorInstructions: Use only the taught session content when evaluating student responses.

coverageSummary: Balanced coverage of the taught session concepts.
balanceNotes: Paper progresses from easier to more demanding questions.

details: Question pattern matches the requested blueprint.
Each question is assigned to a valid section.
Question paper, answer key, and marking scheme are aligned.
No untaught or future-session content included.

messages.content: Return only valid JSON that matches the requested schema. Do not include markdown or explanations.
